title: Cisco IOS — MSTP with multiple instances

source.description: MSTP with two instances (VLAN 10,20 and 30,40), root primary/secondary, trunk and access ports with portfast

config.description: MSTP with named region, two spanning-tree instances, root bridge election, trunk and access ports with portfast

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei VRP equivalent with stp mode mstp, stp region-configuration, instance vlan mapping, stp root primary/secondary

verification.notes: clean deployable — MSTP Cisco→Huawei mapping well-established: spanning-tree mst→stp region-configuration, instance vlan mapping, spanning-tree portfast→stp edged-port, root primary/secondary. max_level=warning allows style warnings. No capability gaps.
